message:
fix: session-type panic→Result, join macro fork parsing, GF256 shared setup, budget/epoll/web cleanups

Session types (src/obligation/session_types.rs):
- Replace `.take().expect("...")` panics with proper `SessionError::NoTransport`
  error returns in send_async, select_left_async, select_right_async, and
  offer_async. The previous code panicked if transport was None (which happens
  on pure typestate channels), but these async methods are public API — panicking
  on misuse is a library bug. The transport.take() is now moved inside the async
  block after disarming, preserving the cancel-safety property while returning
  a clean error.
- Add `SessionError::NoTransport` variant with Display implementation.

Join macro (asupersync-macros/src/join.rs):
- Replace `peek2(Token![;])` with a forked parse attempt for detecting the
  optional `cx` argument. `peek2` only looks one token ahead, which fails for
  complex expressions like `&my.cx` — the fork approach speculatively parses
  a full Expr and then checks for the semicolon separator, correctly handling
  arbitrary expression complexity.

GF256 (src/raptorq/gf256.rs):
- Extract `mul_slices2_sequential_with_shared_setup()` from the fallback path
  of `gf256_mul_slices2`. When the fused dual-mul path is skipped (slices too
  small), the previous code called `dispatch.mul_slice` twice, each of which
  independently recomputed the multiplication table and nibble tables. The new
  function computes these once and dispatches both slices through the
  appropriate SIMD/scalar path. Adds a test proving equivalence with the
  independent two-call path.

Epoll reactor (src/runtime/reactor/epoll.rs):
- Simplify the EBADF match arm: inline the `fcntl(F_GETFD) == -1` check
  into the match guard instead of a nested if/else, eliminating the dead-fd
  check as a separate binding. Same semantics, fewer lines.

Budget sleep (src/time/budget_ext.rs):
- Simplify the post-sleep elapsed check: compare `effective_duration < duration`
  directly instead of re-calling `BudgetTimeExt::remaining_duration`, which
  redundantly recomputes the same value used to derive effective_duration.

Web middleware (src/web/middleware.rs):
- Remove unnecessary `&` on `self.policy.expose_headers.join(", ")` — the
  method already returns an owned String accepted by set_header.

Multipart (src/web/multipart.rs):
- Simplify `find_blank_line` match: merge `(Some(_), Some(l))` and
  `(None, Some(l))` arms into `(Some(_) | None, Some(l))` since both
  return the same lf-based result.

WebSocket split (src/net/websocket/split.rs):
- Fix Clippy lifetime elision: `impl<'a, IO>` → `impl<IO>` with `'_` on
  both Future and Drop impls of AcquireWritePermitFuture.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
